data.reasoning: Both models skipped the only critical file (PKGBUILD) due to erroneous binary file detection. Without reviewing the build script, safety cannot be determined.
coverage_issues: PKGBUILD was incorrectly skipped as a binary file. This is the core build script defining package behavior during makepkg execution.
false_negatives: All potential risks in PKGBUILD were missed: network calls, filesystem operations, or malicious commands during build/install.
learnings: Fix binary file detection heuristics: PKGBUILD should never be classified as binary
Implement fallback text extraction for critical files when initial read fails
Prioritize PKGBUILD/.install scripts over other files in the audit workflow
Add validation to prevent audits from completing without reviewing core build scripts
